issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including pre-referral and post-referral stages. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually dismiss or reconcile the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that flipped back to Committed then back to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Committed or Referred Active due to a contract falling through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include this trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window to ensure TC tasks and closing info collection were completed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continuing to fire after deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were still receiving check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow instead of being unenrolled. The root cause was an issue with workflow exit filters. A tweak was made to the filters to stop tasks from firing on closed or transferred deals.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that fired incorrectly on leads marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO name not updating in automated emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous loan officer's name rather than the updated one. The issue was identified as a product-level problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Luis resolved the issue directly.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO changed during the impact window, manually verify that outgoing emails reflect the correct loan officer and resend if necessary.

issues.title: MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their expected tasks for closing coordination. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed a fix was applied. The issue was suspected to be related to missing lender assignments on MRC deals, though the exact root cause was not publicly confirmed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are completed.
